pages.name: Help Center Home
pages.description: Entry point to the video streaming service Help Center, with global search, main categories, quick links, highlighted topics, and device entry points.
primary_functions: Run a global Help Center search from the main search bar
Browse and open main help categories such as Account & Billing, Watching on TV, Account & Profiles, and Devices
Access highlighted topics like streaming quality, cancellations, downloads, and parental controls
Jump to the Devices section via top navigation
Access quick links to Saved articles and generic Contact support

params.query: search term entered in main search bar

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the main search form at the top of the Help Center home page
Click the 'Account & Billing' category card
Click the 'Account & Profiles' category card
Click the 'Watching on TV' category card
Click a 'Browse by device' or similar devices entry tile in the highlighted section
Click the 'View all saved articles' link in the saved articles preview
Click a 'Contact support' quick link or button on the Help Center home page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Help Center' header navigation link (index.html)
Accessed via the 'Help Center home' footer link
Users can land directly on index.html from outside the Help Center

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Displays global search results for help articles with topic, device, plan, rating, maturity filters, and sorting controls.
primary_functions: Display search results for a given query (e.g., '4K streaming requirements', 'VC_201 error', 'download limits Standard plan')
Filter results by topic (e.g., Streaming quality, Downloads)
Filter results by device (e.g., Computer) and plan (e.g., Standard)
Sort results by relevance, last updated (newest), or rating
Open an article from the results list in the article detail page

incoming_params.description: Free-text search query entered in the global Help Center search bar, e.g., '4K streaming requirements', 'VC_201 error'.
Optional comma-separated list of Topic.code values applied from the topic filter sidebar, e.g., 'streaming_quality,downloads'.
Optional comma-separated list of Device.code values from the device filter, e.g., 'computer,smart_tv'.
Optional comma-separated list of Plan.code values from the plan filter, e.g., 'standard'.
Minimum average rating selected from rating filters (e.g., 4 or 4.5).
Optional maturity filter level applied, such as 'teens'.
Sort order value selected from sort dropdown, e.g., 'relevance', 'last_updated_newest', 'highest_rated'.
Current pagination page number for the search results.
Number of results per page; can be adjusted for pagination.

params.articleId: ID of the selected article from the results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a search result title or summary

access_methods.description: Accessed when submitting the global search form, which redirects to search_results.html with ?query=...
Accessible via manually navigating to a bookmarked search_results.html URL with query parameters

pages.name: Category Landing
pages.description: Landing page for a single help category (Account & Billing, Watching on TV, Account & Profiles), listing subcategories and featured articles.
primary_functions: Present an overview of a selected category (e.g., Account & Billing, Watching on TV, Account & Profiles)
List and open subcategories such as Canceling your subscription, Payment methods & charges, Parental controls & PINs, Streaming issues
Show featured articles within the category for quick access
Provide breadcrumb navigation back to the Help Center home

incoming_params.description: Category.code identifying which category to show, e.g., 'account_billing', 'account_profiles', 'watching_on_tv'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Canceling your subscription' subcategory link within the Account & Billing category
Click the 'Payment methods & charges' subcategory link within the Account & Billing category
Click the 'Parental controls & PINs' subcategory link within the Account & Profiles category
Click the 'Streaming issues' subcategory link within the Watching on TV category

params.articleId: ID of the selected featured article

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a featured article card in the selected category

access_methods.description: Account & Billing, Account & Profiles, and Watching on TV header links point to category.html with specific categoryId values
Accessed from Help Center home category cards linking to category.html?categoryId=...
Other pages like About, Terms, and Privacy may deep-link to category.html with a categoryId parameter

pages.name: Subcategory / Article List
pages.description: Lists articles within a specific subcategory (e.g., Canceling your subscription) or device/topic combination (e.g., Android subtitles), with filters and internal search.
primary_functions: Display all articles in a selected subcategory (e.g., Canceling your subscription, Streaming issues, Payment methods & charges, Parental controls & PINs) or a device topic (e.g., Android subtitles, captions & audio)
Filter articles by rating (e.g., 4+ stars, 4.5+ stars) and age/maturity (e.g., Teen, 13+)
Filter or sort by highest rated, most recent, or other criteria
Provide an internal search field to find articles within the current subcategory/topic (e.g., 'update card' within Payment methods & charges)
Open a selected article in the article detail page
Provide breadcrumb navigation back to the parent category or device help page

incoming_params.description: Subcategory.id identifying which category-based subcategory to list articles for, e.g., canceling subscription, streaming issues.
Internal search text to filter articles within the current subcategory, e.g., 'update card' in Payment methods & charges.
Minimum article rating selected for the list filter (e.g., 4 or 4.5 stars).
Maturity filter level for parental control content, e.g., 'teens' for 13+ guidance.
Sort option for the article list, such as 'last_updated_newest' or 'highest_rated'.
Current page number for subcategory article pagination.
Number of articles per page in the subcategory list.
When viewing device-specific topics, the Device.code to filter articles for, such as 'android_phone_tablet'.
Topic.code defining the device topic article list, such as 'subtitles_captions_audio' or 'downloads'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title in the subcategory or device-topic article list

access_methods.description: Accessed from Category pages via subcategory.html?subcategoryId=..., including for Canceling your subscription, Payment methods & charges, Parental controls & PINs, and Streaming issues.
Accessed from Device Help Topics via subcategory.html?deviceCode=...&topicCode=... for device-specific topics such as Android 'Subtitles, captions & audio'.

pages.name: Devices
pages.description: Top-level Devices section listing all supported device types (Android phone or tablet, smart TV, computer, set-top box).
primary_functions: Display tiles or links for each supported device (e.g., Android phone or tablet, Smart TV, Computer, set-top box)
Open the help topics page for a selected device type in the Device Help Topics page
Provide a path from the main navigation to device-specific help flows (e.g., Android subtitles articles)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Android phone or tablet' device tile
Click the 'Smart TV' device tile
Click the 'Computer' device tile
Click the 'Set-top box' device tile

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Devices' header navigation link (devices.html)
Accessed via the 'Devices' footer link
Accessed from Help Center home via 'Devices' or similar quick link tiles

pages.name: Device Help Topics
pages.description: Landing page for a specific device, listing its main help topics (e.g., Subtitles, Streaming quality, Downloads, App issues).
primary_functions: Present an overview of help areas for a selected device (e.g., Android phone or tablet)
List topics such as Getting started, Subtitles, captions & audio, Streaming quality, Downloads, App issues
Open a topics article list in the Subcategory / Article List page with device and topic context
Provide breadcrumb navigation back to the Devices page and Help Center home

incoming_params.description: Device.code representing the selected device type, e.g., 'android_phone_tablet', 'smart_tv', 'computer', 'set_top_box'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Subtitles, captions & audio' topic for Android phone or tablet
Click the 'Downloads' topic for Android phone or tablet
Click the 'Streaming quality' topic for computers

access_methods.description: Reached from the Devices page by selecting a device tile, passing device_help.html?deviceCode=...
May be deep-linked from Accessibility or other pages for device-specific assistance

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Displays full help article content including sections, instructions, language switching, save/bookmark controls, feedback, related articles, and contextual support CTAs.
primary_functions: Show full article content including headings, numbered instructions (e.g., cancellation steps), and sections (e.g., Cancel using a web browser, Profile-level controls, Change your payment method online)
Allow users to save or unsave the article to their Saved articles list via a Save/bookmark icon
Provide a language selector (e.g., EN, Spanish (ES)) to switch article content language
Allow users to rate the article as helpful or not (e.g., 'Yes' / 'This article was helpful')
Display related articles and open them (e.g., download limits for other plans, PIN setup article)
Provide a contextual 'Contact support about this issue' button that opens the Contact Support page with topic and article context
Show contact options (Chat, Phone, Email) with estimated wait times at the bottom for certain articles (e.g., error VC_201) and link to the appropriate Contact Support mode

incoming_params.description: Article.id of the help article to display in detail.
Optional language code for the localized article body, e.g., 'en' or 'es'; changed when the language dropdown is used.

params.articleId: ID of the selected related article

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a related article link in the 'Related articles' or 'Related topics' section
Click the 'Contact support about this issue' button in the article body

params.contactOptionId: ID of the selected contact option (e.g., chat, phone, email)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a specific contact option (e.g., Chat) with wait time at the bottom of an article such as VC_201
Click the 'Go to payment settings' CTA in sections like 'Change your payment method online'
Click the 'Open profile settings in a new tab' link in the 'Profile-level controls' section of parental controls articles

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user selects an article from search results, subcategory lists, device-topic lists, or saved articles, via article.html?articleId=...
Individual articles may be bookmarked and opened directly via their article.html?articleId=... URLs

pages.name: Contact Support
pages.description: Unified support contact page for streaming, billing, downloads, parental controls, and technical issues, supporting article-context and generic entry flows.
primary_functions: Allow users to select or confirm a support topic (e.g., Streaming quality) via a Topic dropdown
Provide a subject field and detailed description text area to submit issue details (e.g., buffering on smart TV that happens every evening around 8 PM)
Show and handle different contact methods such as Chat, Email, or Phone, depending on context or user choice
For chat or error-related flows, provide an 'Error code' input field (e.g., prefilled or filled with VC_201) and a 'Start chat' or equivalent button
Submit support requests and display an inline confirmation or status message on successful submission

incoming_params.description: Indicates how Contact Support was opened: 'generic' for general support or 'article' for article-specific flows.
For generic flows, the SupportRequest.source_page_type used by getGenericContactSupportConfig, e.g., 'help_center_home'.
When source='article', the Article.id from which the contact flow was started.
Optional ContactOption.id when a specific option (e.g., chat) with known wait time is selected from an article.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Help Center' link or use the Help Center breadcrumb after submitting or canceling a support request

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Contact support' header link for generic support (source=generic, sourcePageType derived from current page)
Accessed from an article's 'Contact support about this issue' button or contact options, passing source=article, articleId, and optionally contactOptionId

pages.name: Saved Articles
pages.description: Dedicated page listing all saved articles with management tools and quick navigation back into article details.
primary_functions: Display a list of all saved articles with titles and brief summaries
Open any saved article in the Article Detail page
Allow users to remove articles from their saved list
Provide sorting or grouping options (e.g., by date saved, category) to manage saved content

incoming_params.description: Sorting mode for the saved articles list, such as 'saved_at_desc' or 'category'.

params.articleId: ID of the selected saved article

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved article title or summary in the saved articles list

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Saved articles' header navigation link
Accessed by clicking 'View all saved articles' from the Help Center home preview

pages.name: Payment Settings
pages.description: Standalone payment settings page reached from help articles or footer, where users can adjust billing country and view payment method details.
primary_functions: Display current payment settings such as payment method and billing information
Allow users to select a billing country from a dropdown (e.g., choose United States)
Provide guidance or tooltips that align with related help articles (e.g., Update the card used for your subscription)
Offer a 'Back to Help Center' link or button to return to the Help Center home or previous article

incoming_params.description: Optional Article.id indicating which help article (e.g., 'Update the card used for your subscription') the user came from.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Back to Help Center' link after viewing or updating billing country or payment method

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Payment settings' footer link
Accessed from a billing-related article CTA such as 'Go to payment settings', which may pass payment_settings.html?fromArticleId=...

pages.name: Profile Settings
pages.description: Profile settings interface for parental controls, maturity ratings, and PIN restrictions, typically opened from related help articles or footer.
primary_functions: Display profile-level settings relevant to parental controls (e.g., maturity rating restrictions, profile locks)
Allow selection or viewing of maturity levels such as Teen or 13+ for a profile
Support changes to parental control options and PIN-related profile settings (conceptually, without separate auth flows)
Provide navigation back to the Help Center via header links or browser controls

incoming_params.description: Optional Article.id indicating the parental controls article from which the user opened profile settings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Help Center' header link or similar navigation control to return to the Help Center

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Profile settings' footer link
Opened from parental controls help articles using a CTA such as 'Open profile settings in a new tab', optionally including profile_settings.html?fromArticleId=...

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information page explaining the purpose, scope, and structure of the Help Center and its relationship to the video streaming service.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose and scope of the Help Center
Provide background information about the streaming service and support approach
Offer links back to key Help Center sections for further assistance

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Go to Help Center home' link in the About page content
Click a link in the About page that points directly to Account & Billing help
Click a link in the About page that points to device-specific help via the Devices page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'About' footer link
Users may access about.html directly from external locations or bookmarks

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal Terms of Use for the streaming service and Help Center, including references to billing, payment, and cancellation policies.
primary_functions: Present the services terms of use and legal conditions
Allow users to reference rules about billing, cancellations, and account usage
Link back to related help categories (e.g., Account & Billing) for practical guidance

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a contextual 'Learn more in Account & Billing help' link inside the Terms of Use content

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Terms of Use' footer link
Can be accessed directly as terms.html from external sites or emails

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Privacy Policy describing how user data is collected, used, and stored, especially in relation to Help Center usage and support interactions.
primary_functions: Explain how personal and usage data is collected and used
Clarify data handling around support interactions and Help Center usage
Provide links to account and profile management help for privacy-related settings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link in the Privacy Policy that points to account and profile management help

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Privacy' footer link
Can be opened directly as privacy.html from external resources

pages.name: Accessibility
pages.description: Accessibility information and support for the Help Center and streaming service, including subtitle and audio help links across devices.
primary_functions: Explain accessibility options in the Help Center and main streaming service (e.g., subtitles, screen reader support)
Provide guidance or links to articles on subtitles, captions & audio settings across devices
Offer contact information or forms for accessibility-related support

params.articleId: ID of a subtitles-related help article for a given device

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a subtitles/captions help article link in the Accessibility page content
Click a link that suggests browsing device-specific accessibility help
Click an accessibility-specific 'Contact support' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Accessibility' footer link
May be linked directly from accessibility statements or regulatory disclosures

header_links.description: Help Center homepage with search and main categories
Device-specific help, including Android, smart TVs, and computers
Billing, payments, and subscription management help
Profiles, parental controls, and PINs help
Help for watching on smart TVs and TV apps
View and manage your saved help articles
General support contact page for chat, email, or phone

footer_links.description: Return to the Help Center homepage
About the streaming service and this Help Center
Read the service terms and conditions
Go to payment settings for billing country and method changes
Open profile settings for parental controls and related options
